channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: This week on "Sunday Morning" (Feb. 22)
item.description: A look at the features for this week's broadcast of the Emmy-winning program, hosted by Jane Pauley.

item.title: Gov. Shapiro blasts Trump’s tariff policy after Supreme Court rebuke
item.description: "I wish [Trump] would just adhere to the Supreme Court's ruling and stop the pain for the American people," Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro tells ABC N...

item.title: Blizzard warnings send East Coast scrambling to prepare for heavy snow and strong winds
Open: This is "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," Feb. 22, 2026
item.description: This week on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," as the Supreme Court struck a blow to President Trump's tariffs, Margaret Brennan speaks to U.S....

item.title: Maps show winter storm forecast bring snow, blizzard conditions to East Coast
item.description: Blizzard warnings were issued Saturday for New York City, New Jersey and coastal communities along the East Coast.

item.title: 1/18: Face The Nation
item.description: This week on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem joins to discuss recent federal action in Minneapolis. T...

item.title: Eileen Gu defends Olympic ski halfpipe title for her 6th career medal at Winter Games
item.description: Eileen Gu defended her Olympic ski halfpipe title to make it six medals in six events over her Winter Games career

item.title: Armed man shot and killed after entering secure perimeter of Mar-a-Lago, Secret Service says
item.description: U.S. Secret Service announced Sunday that an armed man was shot and killed after entering the secure perimeter of Mar-a-Lago, President Donald Trump’s...

item.title: U.S. beats Canada in thrilling and nail-biting Olympics gold medal final
item.description: Through a sudden death overtime goal, the U.S. men's hockey team is golden over Canada.

item.title: Man shot, killed by Secret Service outside of Mar-a-Lago, agency says
item.description: The man was shot following an "unauthorized entry" into the perimeter of President Donald Trump's Florida residence, the Secret Service said.

item.title: WATCH: Conan O'Brien breaks silence on Reiner killings
item.description: Oscar host Conan O'Brien breaks his silence on the deaths of his friends Rob and Michelle Reiner, describing the disbelief he felt at the news.

item.title: Crews recover bodies of 9 backcountry skiers days after California avalanche
WATCH: New dinosaur species discovered deep in the Sahara Desert
item.description: Spinosaurus Mirabilis is believed to be roughly the size of a Tyrannosaurus Rex and about 95 million years old, researchers said
